name: 1% Cambiamos Cheques
description_short: 1% Cambiamos Cheques offers check cashing and money transfer services across Houston locations with an advertised 1% flat fee and same-day cash access.
description_long:
1% Cambiamos Cheques operates as a check-cashing and money transfer service provider in Houston, Texas. The company positions itself as an affordable alternative to traditional banking for customers who need immediate access to funds from various check types.

The company offers check cashing for multiple check categories including paychecks, personal checks, business checks, traveler's checks, cashier's checks, and certified checks. Beyond check cashing, they provide Western Union and MoneyGram services for both domestic and international money transfers. The business model emphasizes speed and accessibility, with immediate cash disbursement upon verification and no holds or waiting periods.

The primary distinguishing factor is the advertised 1% flat-rate fee structure, which the company positions as "industry-low." This contrasts with typical check-cashing services that may charge percentage-based or tiered fees. The company also emphasizes operational convenience through extended hours and multiple Houston locations, alongside a stated commitment to quick processing and customer satisfaction.

1% Cambiamos Cheques serves a straightforward market need—unbanked and underbanked consumers requiring immediate check conversion to cash without traditional bank relationships. However, potential customers should verify the 1% rate applies to all check types and amounts, confirm location availability, and understand any verification requirements or ID documentation policies, which are not detailed on the website.
pros: Advertised flat 1% fee for check cashing, positioned as below industry standard rates
Immediate same-day cash disbursement with no holds or waiting periods upon verification
Multiple check types accepted including payroll, government, personal, business, and traveler's checks
Dual money transfer services through Western Union and MoneyGram for domestic and international transfers
Multiple conveniently located branches throughout Houston for accessibility
Extended operating hours to serve customers with varied schedules
Simple three-step process: bring check, verification, receive cash on the spot
cons: Website does not specify rate details for different check types or amounts—1% may not apply universally
Limited location information provided; no specific addresses or hours listed on website
No information about ID requirements, verification processes, or documentation needed
No transparency on Western Union or MoneyGram fee structures beyond check cashing rates
No online check cashing option mentioned; customers must visit physical locations
best_for: Unbanked workers who need immediate access to paychecks without a bank account
International money senders supporting family abroad seeking Western Union or MoneyGram services
Small business owners or self-employed individuals cashing business checks quickly
Consumers seeking check-cashing services at transparent, low flat rates
diagnosis: 1% Cambiamos Cheques is best for Houston-area consumers without bank accounts who need rapid check conversion to cash and money transfer services. The primary caveat is that website transparency is limited—verify the 1% rate applies to your specific check type and amount, confirm exact locations and hours, and understand all documentation requirements before visiting.
services: Western Union money transfers (domestic and international)
